Class AuthManager

java.lang.Object
control.AuthManager
public class AuthManager extends Object
Manages PIN-based authentication and lockout logic for the application.

PINs are never stored in plain text; they are hashed with SHA-256 before being persisted via DatabaseHelper. After 3 consecutive wrong attempts the user is locked out for 60L seconds.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private DatabaseHelper
    dbHelper
    Backing store used to persist and retrieve the hashed PIN.
    private int
    failedAttempts
    Number of consecutive failed unlock attempts in the current session.
    private static final long
    LOCKOUT_DURATION
    Duration of the lockout period in seconds.
    private LocalDateTime
    lockoutTime
    Time at which the lockout expires; null when not locked out.
    private static final int
    MAX_ATTEMPTS
    Maximum number of failed attempts before a lockout is triggered.

    • dbHelper

      private DatabaseHelper dbHelper
      Backing store used to persist and retrieve the hashed PIN.

    • failedAttempts

      private int failedAttempts
      Number of consecutive failed unlock attempts in the current session.

    • lockoutTime

      private LocalDateTime lockoutTime
      Time at which the lockout expires; null when not locked out.

      private static final int MAX_ATTEMPTS
      Maximum number of failed attempts before a lockout is triggered.

  • Constructor Details

    • AuthManager

      public AuthManager()
      Constructs an AuthManager and resets the failed-attempt counter.

  • Method Details

    • hash

      private String hash(String pin)
      Hashes a plain-text PIN using SHA-256.
      Parameters:
      pin - plain-text PIN string
      Returns:
      lowercase hex-encoded SHA-256 digest, or null on error

    • setPIN

      public void setPIN(String PIN)
      Hashes and persists a new PIN, replacing any previously stored one. Pass null to remove the PIN entirely.
      Parameters:
      PIN - plain-text 4-digit PIN, or null to disable PIN lock

    • verifyPIN

      public boolean verifyPIN(String pin)
      Verifies an entered PIN against the stored hash. Resets the failed-attempt counter on success; increments it on failure. Always returns false while the user is locked out.
      Parameters:
      pin - plain-text PIN entered by the user
      Returns:
      true if the PIN matches and the user is not locked out

    • isLockedOut

      public boolean isLockedOut()
      Checks whether the user is currently in a lockout period.
      Returns:
      true if locked out and the lockout has not yet expired

    • recordFailedAttempt

      public void recordFailedAttempt()
      Increments the failed-attempt counter and starts a lockout if the maximum number of attempts has been reached.

    • hasPin

      public boolean hasPin()
      Checks whether a PIN has been set for this application.
      Returns:
      true if a hashed PIN exists in the database

    • getSecondsRemaining

      public long getSecondsRemaining()
      Returns the number of seconds remaining in the current lockout.
      Returns:
      seconds until lockout expires, or 0 if not locked out
